title: Cuneiform Tablet #0063: Old Assyrian Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
